title: orthiopteris campylura var. laxa
intro: Orthiopteris campylura var. laxa, also known as the lax-leaved Orthiopteris, is a variety of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Orthiopteris campylura var. laxa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote digestion, making it a sought-after remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
